title: WBJEE 2026 Provisional Answer Key Expected Today - Latest Update

detail.title: WBJEE 2026 Provisional Answer Key Expected Today - Latest Update
detail.short_info: WBJEE 2026 provisional answer key is out today at wbjeeb.nic.in. Check direct link, steps to download, raise objections, marking scheme, and expected result date here.

sections.heading: WBJEE 2026 Provisional Answer Key Expected Today - Latest Update

content.text: The West Bengal Joint Entrance Examinations Board (WBJEEB) is expected to release the WBJEE 2026 provisional answer key today on its official portal. The answer key will be published online for both Paper I (Mathematics) and Paper II (Physics & Chemistry) conducted on 24 May 2026.

As soon as the link goes live, candidates will be able to log in with their application number and password to view the question-wise correct responses and estimate their probable scores before the result. The provisional answer key will remain available only for a limited period, during which students can also raise objections against any answer they consider incorrect.

sections.heading: WBJEE 2026 Answer Key - Overview

rows: West Bengal Joint Entrance Examinations Board (WBJEEB)
Paper I - Mathematics; Paper II - Physics & Chemistry
Online, time-bound, with fee per question

sections.heading: WBJEE 2026 Provisional Answer Key Direct Link @ wbjeeb.nic.in

content.text: WBJEE 2026 answer key will be made available on the official WBJEEB website in the WBJEE 2026 section. Once released, candidates will find a notice titled “Provisional/Model Answer Keys of WBJEE 2026” or similar under the Current Events/Notices area, which will contain the direct login link for the answer key.

Candidates are advised to keep checking the official website instead of relying on third-party links, as the answer key, objection window, and OMR viewing facility are all hosted only on the WBJEEB portal.

sections.heading: How to Download WBJEE 2026 Provisional Answer Key (Once Released)

content.text: You can add exact timings later; keep steps evergreen:

items: Visit the official WBJEEB portal: wbjeeb.nic.in.
Click on “WBJEE 2026” from the list of examinations.
In the Current Events/Notices section, look for “WBJEE 2026 Provisional/Model Answer Key” link.
Click the answer key link; you will be redirected to the candidate login page.
Enter your WBJEE 2026 application number and password, then submit.
The provisional answer key for Paper I and Paper II will be displayed on the screen.
Download the answer key PDF and save or print it to calculate your expected WBJEE 2026 score.

sections.heading: How to Calculate Marks Using WBJEE 2026 Answer Key

content.text: WBJEE uses a category-wise marking scheme, and the answer key helps candidates evaluate their performance before results are declared. The exam typically includes different categories of questions (for example Category I and Category II), each with its own marks per question and negative marking pattern.
To calculate your probable score using the provisional answer key:

items: Compare each of your responses (from memory or OMR sheet when released) with the official answer key.
Award full marks for every correct response as per the category-wise scheme.
Deduct the prescribed negative marks for every incorrect response in categories where negative marking applies.
Do not add or subtract anything for unattempted questions.
Add all category-wise marks to arrive at your expected WBJEE 2026 total score.

content.text: (You can plug in the exact per-category values from the official information brochure in your live article.)

sections.heading: WBJEE 2026 Answer Key Objection Process (Will Open After Release)

content.text: After the WBJEE 2026 provisional answer key is released today, WBJEEB will open an online objection window for a limited period. During this time, candidates can challenge any answer in the provisional key if they have valid academic grounds to believe it is incorrect.

Objections must be filed through the candidate login on the official website; challenges sent via email or post are not accepted. Once the window closes, the board will review all challenges with subject experts and then publish the final answer key, which will be used for result preparation.
WBJEE 2026 Answer Key Objection Fee and Rules

items: Objections will be accepted only against the provisional answer key, not the final answer key.
Candidates must pay an objection fee of ₹500 per question, plus applicable bank charges, for each challenge submitted online.
The fee is generally non-refundable, irrespective of whether the challenge is accepted.
Candidates should upload or quote standard textbooks or credible academic references to support each objection.
WBJEEB’s decision on the challenged questions will be final, and no further correspondence will be entertained.

sections.heading: WBJEE 2026 Marking Scheme and OMR Response Sheet

content.text: WBJEE 2026 is conducted in OMR-based mode, and the scanned OMR sheets are evaluated using the official answer key and marking scheme. WBJEEB is also expected to release the scanned images of candidates’ OMR sheets and machine-read responses for a short duration, allowing them to verify bubbling accuracy and check if any response has been misread.

Candidates can view their OMR and responses by logging into the portal with their application number and password during the specified window, usually around the same time the answer key and objection process are active.

sections.heading: WBJEE 2026 Result Date and Next Steps

content.text: The WBJEE 2026 result will be announced after the provisional answer key is released, objections are resolved and the final answer key is published. The result will be issued as a rank card containing total score and paper-wise component scores in Mathematics, Physics and Chemistry.

Once results are declared, WBJEEB will start the online counselling process for admission to undergraduate Engineering, Technology, Pharmacy and Architecture courses in participating institutes across West Bengal, based on WBJEE 2026 ranks.

sections.heading: WBJEE 2026 Eligibility Criteria (Quick Reminder)

content.text: Reinforce for future aspirants and AI Overview completeness:

items: Nationality: Candidate must be an Indian citizen; state-domicile rules may apply for certain seats.
Age: Minimum 17 years as on 31 December 2026; specific courses may have an upper age limit as per the information brochure.

Qualification: Class 12 or equivalent with Physics, Mathematics and any one of Chemistry / Biotechnology / Computer Science / Computer Application / Technical Vocational subject from a recognised board.
Minimum marks: Required aggregate percentage in core subjects and minimum marks in English, with relaxations for reserved categories as notified by WBJEEB.

sections.heading: WBJEE 2026 Provisional Answer Key - Important Instructions for Candidates

items: Keep checking the official website today for the activation of the WBJEE 2026 provisional answer key link.
Keep your application number and password ready to avoid login issues when the key is released.
Use the official provisional answer key for score calculation; treat coaching keys only as a rough reference.
Once the objection window opens, read the rules carefully before raising any challenges.
Submit objections, along with the fee and proper proof, well before the deadline to avoid last-minute server load.
Remember that your final WBJEE 2026 rank will be determined only based on the final answer key approved by WBJEEB.
